name: ruleskit
description: Generate .cursorrules, .mdc, or SKILL.md files pre-loaded with performance, design, and linting rules for your stack.

scripts.test: node build.js && npx esbuild tests/cli.test.ts --bundle --platform=node --format=esm --outfile=dist-tests/cli.test.js && node --test dist-tests/cli.test.js
